author: cerminar
body:
#### PR description:
Port recent Correlator development to master.

For now:

- SeededCone-8 2-Prong Jet Model (https://github.com/p2l1pfp/cmssw/pull/150)
- Use TMUX18 Layer-1 configuration consistently across the emulation chain (https://github.com/p2l1pfp/cmssw/pull/155)
- accurate emulation of sqrt function (https://github.com/p2l1pfp/cmssw/pull/159)
- NN based vertex association in Puppi (https://github.com/p2l1pfp/cmssw/pull/157)
- TMUX18 emulated GCT inputs (https://github.com/p2l1pfp/cmssw/pull/156)
- Electron pt regression (https://github.com/p2l1pfp/cmssw/pull/160)

17_0_X backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51270 for actual use in the menu evaluation on current MC.

The PR needs data in https://github.com/cms-data/L1Trigger-Phase2L1ParticleFlow/pull/11

#### PR validation:

https://cerminar.web.cern.ch/cerminar/plots/CTL1_valid_140Xv1N0/
title: Phase2 L1T: Correlator development for AR2026 (backport)
